seedanceSegments.title: Hook stiff peak
seedanceSegments.description: Stiff meringue peak pull-up, payoff settle, yolk ribbon, flour sift.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context (not as mandatory wide framing). Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead prep actions. Use @KitchenIslandDefault to preserve terrazzo island identity if framing widens. Use @StandMixer only as mixer bowl and whisk topology. Use @StiffPeakMeringue only as stiff glossy meringue peak target (peak stands straight, tip folds slightly, smooth not grainy). Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for character hands.

Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo countertop, consistent Licorn lighting, no invented wood surfaces.

Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR synchronized with cuts.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.4s: beaters lift glossy stiff peak from @StiffPeakMeringue topology
- 1.4-2.2s: peak trembles and settles, confirming not grainy
- 2.2-3.4s: quick cut to pale frothy yolk ribbon whisked with milk
- 3.4-5.0s: flour sift snowfall into batter (payoff to opening texture)

Scale lock: meringue peak 3-4 cm tall above bowl rim; not dry spikes, not soft curl.
Negative size: not oversized meringue mountain, not flat foam.

Global negatives: no speech, no voiceover, no music, no text, no ingredient lineup table, no pancake in opening shots, no grainy broken meringue.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening texture-first; scene 2 pays off peak quality.
seedanceSegments.risk: Meringue may read dry or grainy; lock glossy smooth peak.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: wet whisk pull; soft bowl tap; sift hiss

seedanceSegments.title: Yolk batter and whip
seedanceSegments.description: Yolk mix, chill cue, meringue whip, sugar, peak check.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead actions. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for island identity. Use @Whisk only as whisk shape. Use @Sieve only as sieve shape. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands.

Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots, no text.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.2s: yolk batter whisk just combined, smooth pale
- 1.2-2.0s: quick chilled-whites timer insert on bowl edge
- 2.0-3.2s: stand mixer foamy whites, sugar stream
- 3.2-4.4s: stiff peak pull-up matching glossy topology
- 4.4-6.0s: flour sift callback or foam-to-peak bridge

Scale lock: same mixer bowl scale as segment-01.
Global negatives: no speech, no music, no text, no yolk in whites.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Continues from opening sift; same bowl scale as segment-01.
seedanceSegments.risk: Yolk contamination in whites if bowls merge visually.

seedanceSegments.title: Fold airy batter
seedanceSegments.description: Staged meringue folds to homogenous airy batter.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for fold shots. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for island identity. Use @Whisk only as whisk shape. Use @StiffPeakMeringue as starting meringue density reference. Use @FoldedSouffleBatter only as final homogenous airy batter target. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands.

Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots, no text.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.3s: one-third meringue whisked into yolk (lighten)
- 1.3-3.0s: half remaining meringue folded, white streaks shrinking
- 3.0-5.0s: final fold until @FoldedSouffleBatter topology, no white streaks
- 5.0-6.5s: batter jiggle showing air suspension
- 6.5-8.0s: hard cut hold on airy batter surface

Fragile physics: preserve bubbles; stop fold when streaks disappear; no overmix collapse.

Scale lock: batter in 20 cm glass bowl, fills one-third depth; not overflowing.
Global negatives: no deflated runny batter, no speech, no music, no text.

seedanceSegments.title: Mound and steam
seedanceSegments.description: Oil film, tall mounds, water steam, lid, pre-flip domes.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @InductionWide as active stovetop and pan view. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only if framing includes island edge. Use @FoldedSouffleBatter as scooped batter source identity. Use @RawTallMoundsInPan only as three tall pale stacked mounds topology (7-8 cm base, 4-6 cm height each, exactly three). Use @SteamedPancakesPreFlip only as pre-flip steamed dome target (matte set tops, steam).

Kitchen continuity lock: black flush induction, dark nonstick skillet 28-30 cm, lowest heat, no wood stovetop.

Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 10 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots, no text.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.2s: thin oil film brush and blot on pan
- 1.2-2.8s: first and second scoop stack tall mounds per @RawTallMoundsInPan
- 2.8-4.0s: three spaced mounds across pan
- 4.0-5.2s: final third scoop piled on each mound
- 5.2-6.5s: water splash steam in pan gaps
- 6.5-8.2s: lid on, condensation and steam cloud
- 8.2-10.0s: brief lid tilt showing @SteamedPancakesPreFlip domes

Scale lock: exactly 3 pancakes; base 7-8 cm; height 4-6 cm per mound; not flat discs, not oversized diner cakes.
Negative size: not miniature silver-dollar pancakes, not single giant cake.

Global negatives: no high heat char, no spreading batter puddle, no speech, no music, no text.

seedanceSegments.title: Roll flip golden
seedanceSegments.description: Offset flip, golden reveal, spring test, second steam.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @InductionWide for pan and flip actions. Use @SteamedPancakesPreFlip as pre-flip dome state. Use @GoldenSoufflePancakesInPan only as post-flip golden set target. Use @OffsetSpatula only as offset spatula shape for slide and roll flip.

Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots, no text.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.5s: offset spatula slides under one dome
- 1.5-3.5s: rolling flip reveals golden underside mid-turn
- 3.5-5.5s: three pancakes match @GoldenSoufflePancakesInPan topology
- 5.5-6.8s: gentle spring press test, set crumb
- 6.8-8.0s: lid and second steam splash, hold

Scale lock: same three-pancake spacing and height as segment-04; golden color even, not burnt.
Risk: forced flip cracks dome; wait until pancake moves easily.

Global negatives: no collapsed flat pancakes, no speech, no music, no text, no fork pierce.

seedanceSegments.title: Plate hero hold
seedanceSegments.description: Plate stack, cream, berries, dust, syrup, static hero for outro.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as hero plating surface. Use @FinalDishVisual only as intact finished stack identity (three tall pancakes, cream quenelle, berries, sugar dust; motionless at end). Use @CharacterSheet for satisfied character in one context shot only; character does NOT touch the dish.

Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 10 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots, no text.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.8s: transfer three pancakes to white plate, intact stack
- 1.8-3.2s: whipped cream quenelle placed (one quenelle)
- 3.2-4.8s: halved strawberries and blueberries placed
- 4.8-6.4s: confectioners sugar snowfall
- 6.4-8.0s: maple syrup slow ribbon drizzle
- 8.0-10.0s: static hero hold matching @FinalDishVisual exactly, no hands, no fork, no bite

Plating quantity lock: 3 pancakes; 4-6 strawberry halves; 8-12 blueberries; one cream quenelle; light sugar dust; thin syrup ribbon.

Continuity: dish intact and motionless from 8.0s to end for outro handoff.
Destructive beats forbidden: no fork tear, no stack collapse, no spoon dive.

Scale lock: stack 12-15 cm total height on plate; bases 7-8 cm; not oversized, not miniature.
Global negatives: no speech, no music, no text, no character touching food in final 2 seconds.

seedanceSegments.title: Licorn celebration outro
seedanceSegments.description: Standardized Licorn celebration outro; app injects canonical prompt at sync.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Dish state locked to FinalDishVisual from segment-06.
